body_text:
Hi Sarah Broderick,

  

Just to give you a quick idea — we offer a few different styles, including
traditional buffet,

more formal plated or family-style meals,

and also a fun churrasco (buffet option with on-site grilling of meats).

Lots of great choices depending on the vibe you’re going for!

  

I attached a detailed copy of our Catering Menus and Packages.

  

Sharing with you some weddings we recently catered:

  

[Preview of What We Do!!
🤗](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1foxuisXYaFLwqzbdsRL21xk_XqbWkoX-/view?usp=sharing)

[Wedding with BBQ Service](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/2m2bo1nib9)

[Backyard
Wedding](https://drive.google.com/file/d/11nuNuIlac8PUT3EL3_hI170Yd_Ha3PKX/view?usp=sharing)

  

[OUR WEBSITE LINK! CLICK HERE!!](https://comeketocatering.com/#packages)

  

  
  
  
  
\-----  
Regards,

**Andre Raw**  
 _​​_ Catering Event Coordinator

📲 C: [(978) 235-3791](tel:19782353791)

📲 W: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)
